creator: avg@icyb.net.ua
text:
This is a new version of multimedia/kplayer port that is designed
for KDE4 environment.
KPlayer is a KDE media player based on MPlayer, www.mplayerhq.hu.
For details see:
http://kplayer.sourceforge.net/#news

pkg-plist is generated using ports-mgmt/genplist.
portlint produces a lot of DOCSDIR related warnings for the plist,
but I am not sure if it's possible and how to fix them.

There are three port patches: two for FreeBSD-specific things,
different include directories for each of KDE4, QT4 and X11; and
one for a general programming issue.
Patch for the latter is submitted upstream, but given not very fast
pace of development there lately (last release was more than two
years ago), I decided to include it in the port.

Generated with FreeBSD Port Tools 0.99
